question: Chapters
feedback: Text does not list main sections of the thesis. It only mentions that the work is divided into two parts without specifying what those parts are.

question: Description
feedback: Text briefly describes contents of each section, but it does not provide a detailed description of what will be covered in each part. It only mentions that the first part will look at sensor classifications and optics 3D surface scanning sensors, while the second part will develop precision measurement criteria and compare sensor accuracy through hole measurements.

question: Structure
feedback: Text can be easily understood as a general structure of the thesis. It clearly states that there are two parts, which is a good starting point for understanding the overall structure of the work. However, it would be helpful to have more details about what each part will cover.
